tools.fallback_policy: Only use a fallback when it preserves quality. If a critical primary fails and no high-quality equivalent exists, stop and notify the user.
notes: Replaces Context7 in this control plane.
Vendored install is preferred on this Windows host to avoid npx cache ABI drift with native modules like better-sqlite3.
Embedded stdio mode is preferred for Cursor global config; the package can also expose HTTP/SSE on localhost:6280 when explicitly launched that way.
Semantic search quality improves when OPENAI_API_KEY is present, but the server still runs without storing any secrets in config files.

Live working client shape is http + url https://tools.artiforge.ai/mcp?pat=${env:ARTIFORGE_PAT}.

tools.fallback_policy: No fallback unless it preserves governance and quality.
notes: The published package exposes a CLI at `dist/cli.js` and the real MCP stdio server at `dist/index.js`; Cursor must target `dist/index.js` directly on Windows.
The requested Python package `context-fabric` may be installed separately, but the VIKAS9793 MCP server wiring uses the Node package `context-fabric`.
Run `context-fabric init` only inside a Git-managed target chosen by the active workspace/control-plane policy.
Do not create a new Git repository in global infrastructure directories just to satisfy init.

tools.fallback_policy: Only use a fallback when it preserves quality. If a critical primary fails and no high-quality equivalent exists, stop and notify the user.
notes: Primary memory path for normal agents. Stop if unavailable; do not fall back to raw Mem0 unless explicitly approved.
Backed by PostgreSQL agent_core on 127.0.0.1:55432 with pgvector VECTOR(1536).
Uses OpenAI text-embedding-3-small when OPENAI_API_KEY is available; local_hash_v1 is offline fallback only.
AgentCore uses Windows environment variables only. Do not create .env fallbacks for gateway credentials.
Gateway launches with AGENT_CORE_PGUSER=agent_ingest and AGENT_CORE_PGPASSWORD=${ENV:AGENT_CORE_AGENT_INGEST_PASSWORD}.
Normal agents use memory_append/search/state; trusted ingest/admin jobs are the only direct PostgreSQL writers.
